jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
99acres invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
